'''IG-109''' was an [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|IG-100 MagnaGuard]] that helped train [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].

During a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] training session witnessed by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] general cut both IG-109 and [[IG-138]] to pieces.
